headline: Launch readiness handoff: live QA path, acceptance checks, and final deployment notes are now easier to run on mobile.
focus: Do not add a new product surface. Make the deployed build easier to verify before launch by tightening the release-check page, build notes, and operator handoff language.
notes: Added a clearer live QA acceptance path for the final mobile click-through after Vercel deploy.
Updated release-check copy so the next action is not more feature work, but a focused deploy verification loop.
Added launch handoff notes for checking Home, Magazine, City, Sample, Planner, Result, Share, and My Trips in one pass.
Kept the GitHub web upload package under 100 files.
